name: CARGILLS (CEYLON) PLC
summary: CARGILLS (CEYLON) PLC is a Sri Lankan conglomerate operating in retail, food and beverage manufacturing, and real estate. The company's retail operations include supermarkets and convenience stores, while its manufacturing segment produces a range of food and beverage products. Cargills (Ceylon) PLC is headquartered in Colombo, Sri Lanka, and focuses on providing high-quality products and services to its customers.
